danger.title: Delete account
danger.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data — trades, journal notes, tags, accounts, discipline history and uploaded images. This cannot be undone.
danger.deleted: Your account and data have been deleted.
danger.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

confirm.title: Delete your account?
confirm.message: This permanently erases all of your data and cannot be undone. Are you absolutely sure?

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: You can have unlimited active accounts

trade.title: Trade settings
trade.subtitle: Preferences applied to how trades are evaluated.

global.title: Global settings
global.subtitle: Display preferences applied across the app.
global.timezoneHint: Used to display trade dates and times.
global.breakevenHint: Set the range of values for a trade to be considered breakeven.

importHistory.title: Import history
importHistory.subtitle: Imports from the last month.
importHistory.empty: No imports in the last month.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this import?
deleteConfirm.message: This permanently removes the import {filename} and all {count} trades created by it. This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.messageNoTrades: This permanently removes the import {filename}. No trades from it remain to delete. This action cannot be undone.

tagsManagement.categoriesSubtitle: You can create a category which can be assigned tags
tagsManagement.tagsSubtitle: You can customize your tags by clicking on the inputs from setups, mistakes, and custom tabs here.
tagsManagement.tagsInlinePlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
tagsManagement.tagsInlineHint: Add tags now, or manage them later in the Tags tab.
tagsManagement.confirmDeleteCategory: Delete category {name} and all its tags?
tagsManagement.confirmBulkCategories: Delete {count} categories and all their tags?
